close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description:
VaultBackend (lib.rs:99-112) has no Debug impl. Most types in a Rust library should derive Debug. The constraint here is that the token field (Zeroizing<String>) leaks into a default-derived Debug, which is a security issue — but the fix is a manual Debug impl that redacts the token, NOT skipping Debug entirely.

Bad behavior: a downstream type that holds VaultBackend cannot derive Debug. Logging frameworks that format with {:?} on the holding struct fail to compile or are forced to skip the field.

Fix: manual impl Debug for VaultBackend that prints addr/mount/secret_path/field but renders token as '[REDACTED]'. Same pattern is needed across all backends with credentials; consider a workspace-wide convention.
title: VaultBackend missing Debug — cannot be logged or used in error contexts that derive Debug
